mapper.select: SELECT * FROM community_electricity_fee WHERE user_id = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM community_electricity_fee WHERE fee_status = #{feeStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM community_electricity_fee WHERE read_month = #{readMonth} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE community_electricity_fee SET user_id = COALESCE(#{userId}, user_id), user_name = COALESCE(#{userName}, user_name), user_room = COALESCE(#{userRoom}, user_room), read_month = COALESCE(#{readMonth}, read_month), last_reading = COALESCE(#{lastReading}, last_reading), current_reading = COALESCE(#{currentReading}, current_reading), surplus_electricity = COALESCE(#{surplusElectricity}, surplus_electricity), used_amount = COALESCE(#{usedAmount}, used_amount), unit_price = COALESCE(#{unitPrice}, unit_price), total_fee = COALESCE(#{totalFee}, total_fee), balance = COALESCE(#{balance}, balance), fee_status = COALESCE(#{feeStatus}, fee_status), due_date = COALESCE(#{dueDate}, due_date), payment_time = COALESCE(#{paymentTime}, payment_time), payment_no = COALESCE(#{paymentNo}, payment_no), overdue_amount = COALESCE(#{overdueAmount}, overdue_amount), reader = COALESCE(#{reader}, reader), read_time = COALESCE(#{readTime}, read_time), update_time = COALESCE(#{updateTime}, update_time), remark = COALESCE(#{remark}, remark) WHERE electricity_id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_electricity_fee ( user_id, user_name, user_room, read_month, last_reading, current_reading, surplus_electricity, used_amount, unit_price, total_fee, balance, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, reader, read_time, create_time, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{readMonth}, #{lastReading}, #{currentReading}, #{surplusElectricity}, #{usedAmount}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalFee}, #{balance}, #{feeStatus}, #{dueDate}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentNo}, #{overdueAmount}, #{reader}, #{readTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
